pattern_description: しらたま・しずく・ひよりのみと、CocoとキャラクターのミックスA。上半期の終わりと七夕・夏本番の節目を、3匹とCocoが一緒に届ける24枚。
week_theme: 上半期ラスト＆七夕・夏本番——3匹とCocoのミックスで届ける、折り返しの節目24枚
desc_ja: 上半期が終わり、七夕が来て、夏が本番になる。折り返しの節目を3匹とCocoが一緒に越える、おはようからおやすみまでの言葉たち。
title_en: Just as You Are, Vol.12 — Midsummer Mix
desc_en: From the end of the first half to Tanabata and true summer — a mixed cast of characters and Coco navigate the midyear turning point with 24 warm stamps.

stamps.scene: 下半期前日の月曜朝、新しい週のスタートに届けたい一番やさしい朝の一言
stamps.send_psychology: 重い言葉よりも、しらたまの軽くて温かい「おはよう」で月曜の朝を始めたい
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: モーニングコーラル・サンライズゴールド・フレッシュホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Morning coral and sunrise gold with fresh white. Sparkling warm eyes, soft light reflection in eyes, gentle and cheerful morning expression.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat with white markings) sits upright with front paws neatly folded, head slightly tilted, eyes bright and curved into warm crescents with tiny star-like reflections. Small morning dew drops on the tips of fur. Soft morning light glows warmly behind. Composition: centered bust view, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おはよう』in warm coral lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 毎朝のルーティンとして届ける愛情確認の言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 「好き」より「今日も好き」のほうが、日常的な愛情がリアルに伝わる
stamps.outfit: Coco: ソフトラベンダーのパジャマセット（朝のゆるさが出る）
stamps.color_scheme: ラベンダー・ローズペタル・クリームホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Lavender and rose petal pink with cream white. Sparkling warm eyes radiating tender daily love, soft embarrassed warmth.
[Character] Coco (stylish woman, sleek bob haircut) in soft lavender pajama set, sitting cross-legged with both hands pressed to her cheeks, eyes curved warmly. Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) snuggles against her side with happy crescent eyes, tiny heart near nose. Composition: bust-up, slightly tilted, large copy space at top left.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『今日も好き』in rose-petal flowing lettering at top left; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 七夕・夏祭り・夏休みの予定など、夏の楽しみを前にした期待感
stamps.send_psychology: 感情をストレートに届けたいとき。ひよりの弾む動きが期待感を代弁する
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: スカイブルー・サンシャインイエロー・フェスティバルゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Sky blue and sunshine yellow with festival gold. Sparkling warm eyes wide with pure joy and anticipation, bright and hopeful expression.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird) with wings spread wide in mid-flutter, feathers catching golden summer light, beak open slightly in a joyful chirp, bright star-like sparkles around body. Cheerful dynamic upward pose. Composition: centered full body, slight upward angle, large copy space at top right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『たのしみ！』with exclamation in sunshine yellow bold lettering at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 6月30日（上半期最終日）に、半年間の労いを届ける
stamps.send_psychology: 「お疲れ様」より「上半期おつかれ」のほうが、節目の重みと親しみが同時に伝わる
stamps.outfit: Coco: セージグリーンのワイドカーディガン＋リネンパンツ（労いのやわらかさ）
stamps.color_scheme: セージグリーン・ウォームサンド・ソフトゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Sage green and warm sand with soft gold. Sparkling warm eyes radiating calm recognition and quiet appreciation.
[Character] Coco in sage green wide cardigan and linen pants, standing in a relaxed composed pose, one hand raised slightly in a warm gentle acknowledgment gesture. Shizuku (small wise turtle with olive watercolor rings on shell) sits at her feet looking up with a steady, deeply understanding gaze. Warm evening summer light softens the background. Composition: full body, slight three-quarter angle, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『上半期おつかれ』in warm sand-gold flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 不安な友達や弱った相手に、静かな確信を持って届ける言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 励まし過ぎず、でも確かに「大丈夫」と言い切れるしずくの言葉が一番効く
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ウォームアイボリー・ソフトティール・ジェントルグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Warm ivory and soft teal with gentle grey. Sparkling warm eyes radiating deep calm reassurance, steady and certain.
[Character] Shizuku (small wise turtle) facing slightly forward with head raised, front flippers folded gently in front, shell in soft watercolor teal-olive tones. Eyes carry a quiet, unshakeable warmth — the look of someone who truly means 'you'll be fine.' Soft diffused light. Composition: centered bust view, tilted slightly upward to meet gaze, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『大丈夫だよ』in warm teal-grey lettering at top center; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 7月1日（下半期スタート）の節目感を大切な人と分かち合う
stamps.send_psychology: 夏の始まりという特別な感情を一緒に喜ぶ。季節の節目を分かち合える関係を確かめる
stamps.outfit: Coco: ホワイトリネンのハルターネックトップ＋ハイウエストのスカイブルーワイドパンツ
stamps.color_scheme: アジュールブルー・クラウドホワイト・サマーゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Azure blue and cloud white with summer gold. Sparkling warm eyes looking upward toward summer sky, bright and open with shared joy.
[Character] Coco in white linen halter top and sky-blue wide-leg pants, standing with face tilted up toward the sky, one hand shading her eyes, other arm slightly open in a welcoming gesture. Hiyori (gentle white bird) flies joyfully beside her at shoulder height, wings catching azure light. Summer cumulus clouds float in watercolor behind. Composition: full body, upward gaze, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『夏、はじまったね』in azure summer lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 夏バテが心配な相手や、久しぶりの人への軽い問いかけ
stamps.send_psychology: 「お変わりありませんか」より「元気？」のほうが、距離を一気に縮める素直な問いかけ
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ハニーアンバー・ウォームクリーム・テラコッタ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Honey amber and warm cream with terracotta orange. Sparkling warm eyes with a naturally inquiring expression, head tilted with genuine curiosity.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) sitting with head tilted to one side, front paw slightly raised, ears perked forward with wide curious eyes carrying tiny warm sparkles. Afternoon honey-amber light catches the fur softly. Composition: three-quarter bust view, head tilted, large copy space at top left.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『元気？』in warm terracotta casual lettering at top left; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 日常に積み重なった感謝を、重みなく届けたいとき
stamps.send_psychology: 「いつもありがとうございます」より「ありがとう、いつも」のほうが体温が高い
stamps.outfit: Coco: ピーチコットンブラウス＋ベージュワイドパンツ（普段着の温かさ）
stamps.color_scheme: ピーチブロッサム・ウォームゴールド・クリームホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Peach blossom and warm gold with cream white. Sparkling warm eyes radiating sincere genuine gratitude, slightly moved expression.
[Character] Coco in peach cotton blouse and beige wide-leg pants, standing with one hand placed over her heart and genuine warm smile. Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) looks up at her with adoring crescent eyes. Soft afternoon peach light. Composition: bust-up, front view, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ありがとう、いつも』in warm peach-gold flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 職場でも友人間でも、一日を共に過ごした仲間に届ける言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 2匹が並ぶことで「一緒に頑張った」という連帯感が生まれる
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ダスクローズ・ウォームライラック・シルバー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Dusk rose and warm lilac with evening silver. Sparkling warm eyes with tired-but-satisfied warmth, mutual recognition between two companions.
[Character] Shizuku (wise turtle) and Hiyori (gentle white bird) side by side in the quiet of a summer evening. Shizuku faces forward with front flippers folded, shell catching dusk light. Hiyori perches beside with wings slightly drooped in pleasant tiredness, eyes still warm. Soft watercolor dusk gradients in background. Composition: side-by-side centered, equal presence, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『お疲れさま』in dusk rose-lilac flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: シリーズ核心メッセージ。自分を責めている人、完璧を求めすぎている人へ
stamps.send_psychology: 変わらなくていいと言い切れるCocoとしずくの確信が、受け取る人の心をほどく
stamps.outfit: Coco: ダスティモーブのルームウェアセット（夜の柔らかさ）
stamps.color_scheme: ダスティモーブ・パールホワイト・ウォームグレー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Dusty mauve and pearl white with warm grey. Sparkling warm eyes with deep quiet certainty and gentle compassion, like someone who truly sees you.
[Character] Coco in dusty mauve lounge wear, seated comfortably with legs tucked to one side, looking directly at the viewer with calm complete acceptance. Shizuku (wise turtle) sits beside her in equally composed quiet presence. Night-blooming summer flowers soften the background watercolor. Composition: seated, direct gaze to viewer, large copy space at top right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『そのままでいい』in pearl-mauve lettering at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 相手のうれしいニュースに素直に全力で喜ぶ
stamps.send_psychology: 自分のことのように喜べるひよりの感情が、相手の喜びをさらに大きくする
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: チェリーレッド・フェスティバルオレンジ・サマーホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Cherry red and festival orange with summer white. Sparkling warm eyes wide open with genuine burst of shared joy and celebration.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird) mid-jump with wings spread wide, beak open in a happy cry, small heart and star confetti bursting around body, feathers catching cherry-red festival light. Pure celebratory energy. Composition: full body centered, upward motion, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『よかったね！』in cherry-festival orange bold lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 6月30日〜7月1日の折り返し、全員で下半期の始まりを誓う
stamps.send_psychology: 4人全員が揃う特別感が、「一緒に残りの半年も」という誓いの重みを作る
stamps.outfit: Coco: ホワイトのサマードレス＋麦わら帽子（夏の始まりを祝う装い）
stamps.color_scheme: スターゴールド・スカイブルー・クラウドホワイト・フレッシュグリーン
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Star gold, sky blue, cloud white, and fresh green — the most hopeful summer turning-point palette. Sparkling warm eyes in all four characters radiating shared hope and warm commitment.
[Character] Coco in white summer dress and straw hat, standing centered with both arms slightly open. Shirotsuma at her right side, Shizuku at her left, Hiyori landing softly on her hat brim — all four together in a warm close grouping under a summer sky watercolor. Golden summer light. Composition: full body centered, all four together, large copy space above.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『後半もよろしく』in star-gold warm lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 大切な人が落ち込んでいるとき、静かに寄り添う言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 何もできなくても「そばにいる」と言い切れるしらたまの温かさが一番刺さる
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ソフトインディゴ・ムーンライトクリーム・ペリウィンクル
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Soft indigo and moonlight cream with periwinkle blue. Sparkling warm eyes with gentle unwavering presence, quiet deep solidarity.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) sitting quietly, leaning very slightly toward the viewer, eyes soft and steady — not pitying, just completely present. Moonlight summer evening light creates a gentle indigo-cream glow around the body. Composition: centered bust view, slight lean forward, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『そばにいるよ』in indigo-cream flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: さりげなく心の窓を開けておく。押しつけでなく、でも確かな扉
stamps.send_psychology: 「相談して」より「何かあれば言って」のほうが相手に選択肢を与えられる
stamps.outfit: Coco: フォレストグリーンのリブカットソー＋リネンパンツ（落ち着いた存在感）
stamps.color_scheme: フォレストグリーン・アースブラウン・ウォームサンド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Forest green and earth brown with warm sand. Sparkling warm eyes radiating open, non-pressuring availability and calm acceptance.
[Character] Coco in forest-green ribbed top and linen pants, standing in a relaxed open pose — not reaching, just clearly available, calm half-smile, one hand resting loosely at side. Shizuku (wise turtle) at her feet with shell facing slightly forward, an equally steady 'I'm here' presence. Composition: full body, slight side angle, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『何かあれば言って』in warm earth-green lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.dialogue: お願い叶いますように🌟
stamps.scene: 七夕（7/7）を前に、相手の夢や願いを応援する言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 七夕の前後に使いたくなる一枚。相手の願いを純粋に応援できる稀有なスタンプ
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: 七夕ミッドナイトブルー・スターダストゴールド・シルバーホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Tanabata midnight blue and stardust gold with silver white. Sparkling warm eyes looking upward toward the Milky Way, filled with pure sincere wishing.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) and Hiyori (gentle white bird) side by side under a watercolor Milky Way. Shirotsuma has front paws pressed together as if making a wish, eyes upward. Hiyori has wings slightly raised, also looking up at the stars. Small golden star confetti and soft indigo watercolor around both. Composition: side by side, upward gaze, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『お願い叶いますように🌟』in stardust gold lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 頑張っている人への、押しつけでない柔らかい応援
stamps.send_psychology: 「頑張って」は義務を感じさせるが、「笑顔でいてね」は相手を主語にした祈り
stamps.outfit: Coco: モーニングイエローのリネンワンピース＋ゴールドのアクセサリー
stamps.color_scheme: モーニングゴールド・ウォームイエロー・サンライズオレンジ
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Morning gold and warm yellow with sunrise orange. Sparkling warm eyes radiating genuine sunrise warmth and soft blessing, bright hopeful expression.
[Character] Coco in morning-gold linen dress, standing with face slightly lifted, arms gently open, golden morning light behind her. Hiyori (gentle white bird) flies beside at shoulder height with wings spread as if offering a blessing. Warm sunrise watercolor light streams behind both. Composition: full body, slight upward look, open arms, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『笑顔でいてね』in morning gold lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 夏バテや疲れた相手に無理させない言葉
stamps.send_psychology: 動くことを推奨するスタンプが多い中で、「休んでいい」という言葉が最も刺さることがある
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: シーフォームグリーン・アクア・ジェントルティール
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Seafoam green and aqua with gentle teal. Sparkling warm eyes half-closed in peaceful permission, calm and unhurried expression.
[Character] Shizuku (wise turtle) sitting in a very still, settled posture, shell catching soft seafoam-green watercolor light. Eyes in a gentle half-moon of permission and peace. A single tiny summer flower rests near the shell. Composition: centered, low perspective, very settled feeling, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『ゆっくりしてね』in seafoam-teal flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.dialogue: 一緒にいられてよかった
stamps.scene: 大切な関係への深い感謝を、素直に届ける
stamps.send_psychology: 上半期の終わりに送りたい。時間の積み重ねへの感謝が「一緒にいられてよかった」には込められている
stamps.outfit: Coco: ローズゴールドのシルクブラウス＋クリームのテーパードパンツ
stamps.color_scheme: ローズゴールド・シャンパン・ウォームクリーム
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Rose gold and champagne with warm cream. Sparkling warm eyes slightly glistening with genuine moved emotion, soft and deeply sincere expression.
[Character] Coco in rose-gold silk blouse and cream tapered pants, standing with both hands pressed gently to her heart, expression: genuinely moved and grateful, a small involuntary smile. Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) curled happily at her feet, eyes curved into warm crescents. Summer evening rose-gold light. Composition: bust-up to full body, forward-facing, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『一緒にいられてよかった』in rose-gold warm lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 猛暑の夏、夏バテ防止のかわいい気遣い
stamps.send_psychology: 義務的な注意ではなく、ひよりが届けると「あなたのことが心配」という愛情に変わる
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: アクアブルー・オーシャンティール・クリスタルホワイト
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Aqua blue and ocean teal with crystal white. Sparkling warm eyes wide with urgent friendly concern, playfully emphatic expression.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird) with wings spread wide in a playful urgent gesture, beak open in a bright energetic call, small water droplets floating around wings in aqua watercolor, body catching teal-aqua summer light. Bright summer noon energy. Composition: centered full body, wings wide, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『水分とって！』in aqua-teal energetic lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.dialogue: よろしくお願いします
stamps.scene: 7月の新しいプロジェクトや仕事の開始、ビジネスシーンで使える
stamps.send_psychology: 冷たくなりがちな敬語に、CocoとしずくのスタンプなTera体温が加わる
stamps.outfit: Coco: ネイビーリネンのテーラードジャケット＋クリスプホワイトシャツ
stamps.color_scheme: ディープネイビー・ブライトホワイト・ゴールドアクセント
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Deep navy and bright white with gold accent. Sparkling warm eyes with composed professional sincerity and genuine warm respect.
[Character] Coco in navy linen tailored blazer over crisp white shirt, standing with excellent posture and both hands clasped gently in front in a composed, genuinely warm bow of respect. Shizuku (wise turtle) beside her in an equally formal yet warm pose, shell accented with gold watercolor. Composition: bust-up to full body, front view slight bow, large copy space at bottom.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『よろしくお願いします』in navy-gold warm-professional lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 2匹が仲良く夏の夜をおやすみで締めくくる
stamps.send_psychology: 1匹より2匹で届けることで「今夜もあなたとおやすみが言えてよかった」という温度が生まれる
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ミッドナイトネイビー・ムーンライトシルバー・ナイトラベンダー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Midnight navy and moonlight silver with night lavender. Sparkling warm eyes both softly half-closed in mutual peaceful drowsiness.
[Character] Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) curled up softly on the left, eyes in gentle peaceful crescents. Shizuku (wise turtle) tucked beside on the right, shell gleaming with moonlight silver watercolor, head lowered in serene rest. Small fireflies glow softly in the summer night background. Composition: side by side, settled low, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『おやすみ〜』with trailing 〜 in moonlight-lavender flowing lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 下半期スタート、共に新しい目標に向かうときの一言
stamps.send_psychology: 「頑張れ」は一人称だが、「一緒に頑張ろう」は二人称になる。その差が大きい
stamps.outfit: Coco: エナジーコーラルのノースリーブニット＋ホワイトのテーパードパンツ（活動的な夏）
stamps.color_scheme: エナジーコーラル・フレッシュホワイト・サンシャインイエロー
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Energy coral and fresh white with sunshine yellow. Sparkling warm eyes with warm confident excitement, forward-leaning energy.
[Character] Coco in coral sleeveless knit and white tapered pants, standing with one arm extended forward and fist slightly raised in a warm rallying gesture, confident bright smile. Shirotsuma (fluffy black cat) beside her with front paw raised in a matching mini-cheer pose, eyes bright and determined. Morning summer light. Composition: full body, slight forward lean, large copy space at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『一緒にがんばろう』in sunshine-coral energetic lettering at top; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 七夕前日（7/5）の夜、自分の願いを空に放つ
stamps.send_psychology: 七夕の夜に誰かと「星に願いを」を共有できる関係は特別。ひよりが言葉の翼になる
stamps.outfit: なし（キャラのみ）
stamps.color_scheme: ディープインディゴ・コズミックパープル・スターダストゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Deep indigo and cosmic purple with stardust gold. Sparkling warm eyes gazing upward at the Milky Way with awe and pure sincere wishing.
[Character] Hiyori (gentle white bird) in flight upward toward the stars, wings spread wide, feathers catching stardust-gold cosmic light, trails of tiny golden stars following the wing path. The Milky Way painted in soft indigo-violet watercolor above. Composition: full body in upward flight, large copy space around flight path at top.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『星に願いを🌟』in stardust gold flowing lettering beside the flight path; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated character, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.

stamps.scene: 一日の終わりに、そっと感謝を届ける
stamps.send_psychology: 「ありがとうございました」より「今日もありがとう」のほうが、積み重ねへの感謝が伝わる
stamps.outfit: Coco: ムーンライトブルーのやわらかいルームウェア（夜の温もり）
stamps.color_scheme: ムーンライトブルー・ウォームアイボリー・シャンパンゴールド
stamps.image_prompt:
[Style] Soft watercolor illustration, gentle pastel tones, hand-painted texture, warm and cozy feeling. Moonlight blue and warm ivory with champagne gold. Sparkling warm eyes softly grateful and peacefully settled, end-of-day warmth.
[Character] Coco in moonlight blue soft loungewear, sitting with legs tucked gently to one side, one hand raised in a small sincere grateful gesture, eyes warm and settled. Shizuku (wise turtle) sits beside in an equally quiet appreciative pose, shell glowing with champagne watercolor light. Firefly light in the summer night background. Composition: seated, gently forward-facing, large copy space at top right.
[Text/Format] Handwritten-style Japanese text『今日もありがとう』in champagne-ivory flowing lettering at top right; 1:1 square format, transparent background, PNG, no background, isolated characters, 1px white outline, 10% soft shadow.
